base_size.note: Varies - happiness bar is 120x2px, care buttons are 8x8px each

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Interactive button to clean cage floor (remove poop)
context.screen_position: Lower right at x=108px, y=108px when care menu is visible (popup)
context.usage_scenario: Appears when player taps screen to open care menu. Tapping this button removes all poop from floor and triggers sparkle effect. Button grays out during cooldown period. Part of 3-button care menu popup.

visual_specification.shape: Square button 8x8px. Contains broom icon (5x6px) centered inside.

animation.description: 2 states: Active state: broom icon in #C2C3C7 (gray). Disabled state: broom icon in #5F574F (darker gray). State changes based on cooldown timer.

visual_specification.details: Button: 8x8px square, #1D2B53 background. Broom icon: 5x6px simple broom shape (handle + bristles) centered. Active: icon #C2C3C7. Disabled: icon #5F574F. Position: x=108px, y=108px. Touch target: full 8x8px area. Broom design: 1px wide handle (3px tall) + 3px wide bristles (3px tall).

relationships.differences_from: Unlike feed button: broom icon (not seed), gray icon color. Unlike pet button: middle position in menu. Unlike happiness bar: interactive button.
